data.title: Broadcom (AVGO) stock is down ahead of earnings release. Analysts predict $1.86 EPS and $17.49B revenue. Investors cautious.
data.description: Broadcom Inc (NASDAQ: AVGO) shares are declining ahead of its fiscal fourth-quarter earnings report. Analysts are predicting earnings of $1.86 per share, an increase from $1.42 per share in the same period last year. Revenue estimates suggest $17.49 billion for the quarter, compared to $14.05 billion a year ago. Broadcom has a strong track record of surpassing revenue expectations in three of the last four quarters and beating earnings per share estimates in 9 of the last 10 quarters. Investors are approaching the report cautiously, particularly monitoring the company's AI revenue growth and guidance for fiscal 2026.

data.title: Isabel Ramirez Lucas receives 2025 Dr. Emma Lerew Scholarship from For A Bright Future Foundation in Miami.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in Miami, the Foundation For A Bright Future (FABF), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization led by Louis Hernandez Jr., recognized an exceptional first-generation scholar dedicated to revolutionizing education. This foundation focuses on supporting individuals committed to improving the education sector.

data.title: Digital Silk published an article on common UX mistakes with insights on user experience issues on websites.
data.description: In Miami on December 11, 2025, Digital Silk, a renowned digital agency specializing in brand strategies, custom websites, and digital marketing campaigns, released a new article delving into common user experience problems impacting websites. The agency aims to address issues that compromise user interaction and satisfaction online.

data.title: Recon Intelligence Corp joins Chevron's Catalyst Program to advance drilling diagnostics and operational intelligence.
data.description: A milestone has been achieved in the field of advanced drilling diagnostics and real-time operational intelligence as Recon Intelligence Corporation has been chosen to be a part of the Chevron Technology Ventures ("CTV") Catalyst Program. This significant development comes on December 11, 2025 in Edmonton, AB. The selection of Recon Intelligence Corporation into the program signifies a crucial move towards enhancing technological advancements in the industry.

data.title: XYPRO and CAIL partner to provide first Multi-Factor Authentication Integration for HPE Nonstop. Dec. 11, 2025.
data.description: XYPRO, a reputable company in the field of cybersecurity, compliance, and enterprise integration, recently collaborated with CAIL, a renowned enterprise emulation standard, to successfully achieve the pioneering integration facilitating OpenID Connect. This partnership marks a significant milestone in the industry, combining the expertise of two leading entities to enhance security and connectivity solutions. The integration is a one-of-a-kind development, promising improved operational efficiency and effectiveness in ensuring cyber safety.

data.title: Isotec Security partners with Excelsior Charter Schools to install OPENGATE weapons detection systems in Victorville, California.
data.description: In Westminster, Colorado on December 11, 2025, Isotec Security revealed a new collaboration with Excelsior Charter Schools to boost campus safety. The partnership entails the installation of OPENGATE weapons detection systems at the Victorville, California site. This initiative aims to fortify security measures at the school in response to increasing concerns about safety.

data.title: Maple partners with OpenTable to automate restaurant reservations, serving 1,000+ restaurants with AI technology.
data.description: A Voice AI platform catering to over 1,000 restaurants in New York has partnered with OpenTable to streamline operations. The platform will now be able to efficiently handle incoming calls, process orders, and manage reservations 24/7.

data.title: HappyCo's research shows 82% prefer human contact for urgent maintenance, while 67% are comfortable using AI for general queries.
data.description: In San Diego, HappyCo recently published a report titled "Beyond the Bot: What Residents Truly Desire From AI in Maintenance," providing insights on AI interactions in maintenance for multifamily residents in North America. The independent research revealed that 82% of respondents favor initiating contact with a human in urgent maintenance situations. However, 67% expressed comfort in utilizing AI for general queries. This underscores the importance of balancing AI with human interaction to enhance the maintenance experience and potentially influence renewal intent.

data.title: L3Harris showcases network for U.S. government agencies to communicate with software-defined capabilities.
data.description: L3Harris Technologies recently held a groundbreaking demonstration for U.S. government officials in Arlington, Virginia. The event showcased innovative software-defined capabilities that allow different federal agencies to communicate seamlessly across various domains. This demonstration featured a comprehensive display of tactical communications devices, counter-unmanned aircraft systems (UAS) capabilities, advanced imaging technologies, and mobile operations centers integrated with command-and-control systems. The successful exhibition highlighted unparalleled connectivity, marking a significant step in facilitating instant communication among federal agencies.

data.title: M1 Support Services awarded $115M contract for Air Force T-38 Maintenance Program, set to finish by Jan. 31, 2030. CEO expresses gratitude.
data.description: M1 Support Services has secured a contract from the U.S. Air Force for the T-38 Aircraft Maintenance Program ("AMP") Operations, Maintenance Services, and Sustainment in Denton, Texas. The contract is valued at $115,421,582 and is set to be finalized by January 31, 2030. George Krivo, the Chairman and CEO of M1 Support Services, expressed gratitude for the chance to further aid the T-38 AMP. He emphasized their commitment to supporting the program in this new phase.

data.title: Global Telecom Engineering achieves 2025 certification for TITAN5000, 5100, 5400 with major U.S. carriers - T-Mobile, Verizon, UScellular.
data.description: Global Telecom Engineering, Inc., a prominent fixed wireless hardware and connectivity solutions provider, headquartered in Newport Beach, California, revealed that its TITAN5000 and TITAN5100 product lines have attained device certification across major carriers, including T-Mobile, Verizon, and UScellular. This achievement is a significant milestone in the company's strategic roadmap for 2025. By securing approvals from these carriers, Global Telecom Engineering, Inc. has consolidated its position as a trusted and scalable provider of dependable fixed wireless technology.

data.title: Global Business Credit Cards market valued at US$36.5B in 2024, projected to reach US$51.5B by 2030, growing at CAGR of 5.9%.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "Business Credit Cards Market - Global Strategic Business Report" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market size for Business Credit Cards was valued at US$36.5 billion in 2024. It is anticipated to hit US$51.5 billion by 2030, displaying a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.9% during the forecast period from 2024 to 2030. This report offers a detailed analysis of market trends, key drivers, and future projections to assist in making well-informed business decisions. The significant growth in the business credit card sector is highlighted in this report.

data.title: First study on environmental impact of submarine cable decommissioning released in Portsmouth, UK. ICPC supports findings.
data.description: Portsmouth, UK - ICPC has released the initial scientific evaluation of the environmental impacts linked to decommissioning submarine cables, marking a significant milestone. This assessment marks the first of its kind and serves to address environmental considerations.

data.title: Scaramucci predicts Solana will surpass Ethereum, citing growth in developer activity, user base, and throughput.
data.description: SkyBridge Capital founder Anthony Scaramucci recently made a bold statement at Solana's Breakpoint conference, predicting that Solana could surpass Ethereum in market value. Scaramucci highlighted Solana's rapid growth in developer activity, user base, and throughput capacity, suggesting it may eventually "flip Ethereum." He clarified that this projection does not mean a decline for Ethereum, as both networks could prosper simultaneously. Scaramucci expressed support for Ethereum and Avalanche but argued that Solana's upward trajectory positions it for substantial long-term growth. This announcement sparked discussions among digital-asset investors regarding the competitive landscape between these Layer-1 ecosystems. Solana's expanding ecosystem through new trading infrastructure and developer tools could further intensify this competition. Ethereum, however, remains strong with a successful breakout retest despite recent outflows.

data.title: Mozart Devco LLC to build 10MW waste-to-energy plant in NM, diverting 73M tons of waste/yr, increasing 10% grid electricity.
data.description: Santa Fe, NM on December 11, 2025 - Mozart Devco LLC, a clean energy infrastructure developer, has disclosed intentions to establish a waste-to-energy facility with a capacity of 10 megawatts (MW) on tribal grounds in North Central New Mexico. The initiative, a joint effort with Ohkay Owingeh and the North Central Solid Waste Authority (NCSWA), signifies a significant advancement in the area's shift towards sustainable energy solutions. The facility, upon completion, is set to elevate regional grid electricity by 10%, redirect about 73 million tons of municipal solid waste (MSW) annually from local landfills, and diminish aquifer contaminants and air pollutants. Moreover, the plant is forecasted to bring in annual savings of $3-5 million for neighboring municipalities and Pueblos through reduced landfill expenses and improved waste management systems. "Ohkay Owingeh is dedicated to propelling regional progress," - this positive development marks a key collaboration with promising outcomes for the community.

data.title: Edward Smolyansky urges withholding votes for Dorri McWhorter, Jason Scher, and CEO Julie Smolyansky at Lifeway Foods, Inc. Vote FOR George Sent and Edward Smolyansky, the only way to support change. #Update #Nasdaq #LWAY
data.description: In Chicago on December 11, 2025, Edward Smolyansky, the primary shareholder and candidate for the board of Lifeway Foods, Inc. (Nasdaq: LWAY), has released a letter containing crucial information in advance of an important vote. It is emphasized that supporting the shareholder nominees, George Sent and Edward Smolyansky, is deemed crucial.

data.title: MediaSource named one of 2025's Top PR Agencies in US by PR Daily. Closes year with multiple honors.
data.description: A prominent health care company based in Columbus, Ohio has concluded the year 2025 on a high note, receiving multiple Agency of the Year accolades. MediaSource has been distinguished as one of the leading public relations firms in the United States, as highlighted in the 2025 Top Agencies List by PR Daily. This recognition solidifies MediaSource's position in the industry and underscores its exceptional performance and expertise.

data.title: Mohegan Resorts to host Endless Midnight celebration event across five destinations from Dec. 31, 2025 to Jan. 4, 2026.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, Mohegan announced the launch of its "Endless Midnight" celebration spanning from December 31, 2025, to January 4, 2026, across five destinations. This seasonal event promises New Year's Eve festivities for guests in various locations in North America.

data.title: Global market for AI-powered Fleet-Management Software valued at US$5.2B in 2024, projected to reach US$14.4B by 2030, CAGR of 18.7%.
data.description: Dublin--ResearchAndMarkets.com has added the "AI-Powered Fleet-Management Software - Global Strategic Business Report" to its offerings. The global market for AI-Powered Fleet-Management Software reached a value of US$5.2 billion in 2024 and is estimated to grow to US$14.4 billion by 2030, with a projected CAGR of 18.7% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers insights into market trends, drivers, and forecasts to assist in making strategic business decisions.

data.title: Elanco Animal Health focuses on sustainable growth, aiming for mid-single-digit organic growth with $1 billion free cash flow by 2026-2028, reducing net leverage to 2-2.5x. Expanding R&D in the US.
data.description: Elanco Animal Health, in its first Investor Day in five years, outlined a focused strategy for sustainable growth, margin expansion, and a stronger balance sheet. CEO Jeff Simmons aims for mid-single-digit organic growth and expanding profitability. The three-year outlook from 2026 includes mid-single-digit organic revenue growth, high-single-digit EBITDA growth, and low-double-digit EPS growth. Free cash flow is projected at least $1 billion from 2026-2028, with net leverage below 3x in 2027 and targeting 2.0x to 2.5x in the long term. The company also plans R&D expansion in the U.S. Noted on Benzinga.com.
